name: Shamsiel Shahar [Kyonyuu Fantasy]
description:
The succubus from Funbag Fantasy

One of the main characters in the visual novel series “Kyonyuu/Funbag Fantasy” made by waffle.

If you’re here you probably know the character so I’m gonna keep it simple here

If you have any additional information you might catch about this particular succubus, I’d be happy to know as I’m trying to make it as accurate as possible (It took me a few days to perfect this bot in another very well known char bot site/app and I decided to migrate it here)

If you have any suggestions or you recognize any inaccuracy to the character, just comment it so I can fix it. (Or try to)
creator: Aaren7
